bead.title: lint: routinglint regression — run/try/work must not set Profile/Harness/Model
bead.description:
PROBLEM
  The run/try/work dispatch paths must not set Profile, Harness, or Model directly on ResolvedConfig or Runtime structs — those are durable knobs that belong in config.LoadAndResolve. Without a mechanically-enforced lint rule, future edits can silently reintroduce the anti-pattern and bypass the fizeau routing contract.

ROOT CAUSE
  cli/tools/lint/routinglint/analyzer.go (package routinglint) currently forbids retired compensating-routing identifiers (ResolveProfileLadder, ResolveTierModelRef, etc.) and flag literals (--escalate, profile_ladders). It does not yet forbid direct field assignment of Profile/Harness/Model on Runtime structs inside run/try/work command code paths. The SD-024 runtimelint analyzer (cli/tools/lint/runtimelint/analyzer.go:41) forbids durable-knob fields on *Runtime structs generically, but does not name a per-command allowlist or produce a test that verifies the run/work/try paths specifically. No TestRoutingLint* test exercises this invariant.

PROPOSED FIX
  - Extend routinglint (cli/tools/lint/routinglint/analyzer.go) to flag direct Profile/Harness/Model field assignment on types matching *Runtime in cli/cmd/ run/work/try command files, or add a new rule in runtimelint covering this.
  - Alternatively, add a targeted integration test TestRoutingLint_RunPathNeverSetsProfileDirectly that runs the analyzer against the live tree and asserts zero diagnostics for the assignment pattern.
  - Fix any existing violations: cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go:1893-1897 passes overrides.Profile/Harness/Model through CLIOverrides to config.LoadAndResolve — verify this is compliant (CLIOverrides is not a Runtime struct).

NON-SCOPE
  - Changes to agent_run or agent_run_overrides command behavior.
  - Changes to the fizeau or ladder routing logic.
  - Lint rules for non-routing fields on Runtime structs (covered by runtimelint).
bead.acceptance:
1. cli/tools/lint/routinglint/ (package routinglint) contains the new rule or an integration test that enforces the Profile/Harness/Model-on-Runtime prohibition for run/try/work paths.
2. TestRoutingLint_RunPathNeverSetsProfileDirectly in cli/tools/lint/routinglint/ (or a new integration test file): runs go run ./tools/lint/routinglint/cmd/routinglint ./... against the live tree and asserts zero violations for the run/try/work pattern.
3. TestViolations (cli/tools/lint/routinglint/analyzer_test.go:12) still passes.
4. TestClean (cli/tools/lint/routinglint/analyzer_test.go:21) still passes.
5. cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go:1891-1897 CLIOverrides usage verified compliant (CLIOverrides is not a Runtime struct; no lint exemption needed).
6. Any actual violations found in run/work/try paths are fixed or annotated with routinglint:legacy-rejection reason="...".
7. cd cli && go test ./tools/lint/routinglint/... green.
8. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
